channel.title: PrimarySchool on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in PrimarySchool on Nature Works

item.title: Apple pots
item.description:
I took the apple trees to the primary school and talked to the pupils about grafting, clones and propagation

Work continues on the wildlife food forest, albeit slowly, at my local primary school. http://localhost:1313/blog/230323-apple-pots/
